candidate_definition_hints.text: A Kubernetes operator for Apache Flink, implemented in Java. It allows users to manage Flink applications and their lifecycle through native k8s tooling like kubectl.

candidate_glosses.text: A Kubernetes operator for Apache Flink, implemented in Java. It allows users to manage Flink applications and their lifecycle through native k8s tooling like kubectl.
